name: Greenbow County Okra Gumbo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh crabmeat, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook okra in 2 tablespoons butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring constantly, until lightly browned. Set aside.
2. In a large Dutch oven, combine the remaining 1/4 cup melted butter and flour. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the roux is chocolate-colored (20 to 25 minutes).
3. Stir in green onion, celery, and garlic; cook, stirring constantly, until vegetables are tender.
4. Add okra, water, and the next six ingredients. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Peel and devein shrimp; add shrimp and crabmeat to the okra mixture. Simmer an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove and discard the bay leaf. Serve gumbo over rice. Add gumbo file', if desired.
